calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2005 Continued To Dec-05-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Plaintiff: Nasir Patel and Defendant: David Coughlin, are present in pro per.
Matter settled, terms read into the record as follows: Parties stipulated for an entry of future judgment.
Defendant agreed to vacate on or before 5:00 P.M. of Dec. 19, 2005, in exchanged for a waiver of back rent and damages of $3,000.00 through Dec. 6, 2005.
If Defendant failed to vacate, Judgment for Plaintiff upon 24 hrs. Ex Parte Notice for Entry of Judgment for resitution and possession of 2048 Polk St. #318, San Francisco, plus any attorney's fees.
Parties mutaully waive all claims against each other.
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
Matter is deemed settled, Trial vacted.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF NASIR PATEL IN PRO PER
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAVID COUGHLIN

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
